title: Cold front approaching bringing cooler weather on Monday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the SA Weather Service, you can expect cloudy weather with isolated rain and showers along the south coast and adjacent interior on Monday, following the passage of a cold front.

According to Severe Weather and Information Centra SA, the cold front can bring cool to cold conditions over the southwestern and central interior of South Africa tomorrow with isolated showers and windy conditions affecting the south-western, southern and eastern coastal regions on Monday, spreading to the eastern coastal region on Tuesday where it is expected to persist until Wednesday morning.


> There are no weather warnings for Monday.


Expected temperatures on Monday:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
